attributes.title: Shot Map (Vega-Lite)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Shot Map (Vega-Lite)", "type": "vega", "aggs": [], "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"index\": \"football_events\", \"body\": {\"size\": 5000, \"_source\": [\"location_x\", \"location_y\", \"shot_xg\", \"shot_outcome\", \"player_name\", \"team_name\", \"minute\"], \"query\": {\"bool\": {\"must\": [{\"match\": {\"type_name\": \"Shot\"}}]}}}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"hits.hits\"}}, \"layer\": [{\"mark\": {\"type\": \"rect\", \"color\": \"#2d5a27\", \"opacity\": 1}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"value\": 0}, \"y\": {\"value\": 0}, \"x2\": {\"value\": 780}, \"y2\": {\"value\": 520}}}, {\"mark\": {\"type\": \"rect\", \"color\": \"#3a7a34\", \"opacity\": 1}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"value\": 390}, \"y\": {\"value\": 130}, \"x2\": {\"value\": 780}, \"y2\": {\"value\": 390}}}, {\"mark\": {\"type\": \"circle\", \"opacity\": 0.75, \"stroke\": \"white\", \"strokeWidth\": 1}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"_source.location_x\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [0, 120], \"range\": [0, 780]}, \"axis\": {\"title\": null, \"labels\": false, \"ticks\": false}}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"_source.location_y\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [80, 0], \"range\": [0, 520]}, \"axis\": {\"title\": null, \"labels\": false, \"ticks\": false}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"_source.shot_outcome\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [\"Goal\", \"Saved\", \"Blocked\", \"Off T\", \"Wayward\", \"Post\"], \"range\": [\"#ff4444\", \"#ffaa00\", \"#4499ff\", \"#aaaaaa\", \"#888888\", \"#ffff00\"]}, \"legend\": {\"title\": \"Outcome\"}}, \"size\": {\"field\": \"_source.shot_xg\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"scale\": {\"range\": [30, 400]}, \"legend\": {\"title\": \"xG\"}}, \"tooltip\": [{\"field\": \"_source.player_name\", \"title\": \"Player\"}, {\"field\": \"_source.team_name\", \"title\": \"Team\"}, {\"field\": \"_source.shot_outcome\", \"title\": \"Outcome\"}, {\"field\": \"_source.shot_xg\", \"title\": \"xG\", \"format\": \".3f\"}, {\"field\": \"_source.minute\", \"title\": \"Minute\"}]}}], \"width\": 780, \"height\": 520, \"config\": {\"background\": \"#1a1a2e\", \"view\": {\"stroke\": null}}, \"autosize\": \"none\"}"}}

attributes.title: xG Trend by Minute (Vega-Lite)
attributes.visState: {"title": "xG Trend by Minute (Vega-Lite)", "type": "vega", "aggs": [], "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"index\": \"football_events\", \"body\": {\"size\": 0, \"query\": {\"bool\": {\"must\": [{\"match\": {\"type_name\": \"Shot\"}}]}}, \"aggs\": {\"by_minute\": {\"histogram\": {\"field\": \"minute\", \"interval\": 5}, \"aggs\": {\"by_team\": {\"terms\": {\"field\": \"team_name\", \"size\": 2}, \"aggs\": {\"total_xg\": {\"sum\": {\"field\": \"shot_xg\"}}}}}}}}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"aggregations.by_minute.buckets\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"flatten\": [\"by_team.buckets\"], \"as\": [\"team_bucket\"]}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.key\", \"as\": \"minute\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.team_bucket.key\", \"as\": \"team\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.team_bucket.total_xg.value\", \"as\": \"xg\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"area\", \"opacity\": 0.6, \"line\": true}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"minute\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Match Minute (5-min bins)\"}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"xg\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Expected Goals (xG)\", \"stack\": null}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"team\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Team\"}, \"tooltip\": [{\"field\": \"minute\", \"title\": \"Minute\"}, {\"field\": \"team\", \"title\": \"Team\"}, {\"field\": \"xg\", \"title\": \"xG\", \"format\": \".3f\"}]}, \"width\": 600, \"height\": 300, \"autosize\": \"none\"}"}}

attributes.title: Pass Network (Vega-Lite)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Pass Network (Vega-Lite)", "type": "vega", "aggs": [], "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"data\": {\"url\": {\"index\": \"football_events\", \"body\": {\"size\": 0, \"query\": {\"bool\": {\"must\": [{\"match\": {\"type_name\": \"Pass\"}}, {\"exists\": {\"field\": \"pass_outcome\"}}]}}, \"aggs\": {\"by_team\": {\"terms\": {\"field\": \"team_name\", \"size\": 2}, \"aggs\": {\"by_zone_x\": {\"histogram\": {\"field\": \"location_x\", \"interval\": 40}, \"aggs\": {\"by_zone_y\": {\"histogram\": {\"field\": \"location_y\", \"interval\": 26.67}, \"aggs\": {\"pass_count\": {\"value_count\": {\"field\": \"event_id\"}}}}}}}}}}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"aggregations.by_team.buckets\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"flatten\": [\"by_zone_x.buckets\"], \"as\": [\"xb\"]}, {\"flatten\": [\"xb.by_zone_y.buckets\"], \"as\": [\"yb\"]}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.key\", \"as\": \"team\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.xb.key + 20\", \"as\": \"cx\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.yb.key + 13\", \"as\": \"cy\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.yb.pass_count.value\", \"as\": \"passes\"}], \"mark\": {\"type\": \"circle\"}, \"encoding\": {\"x\": {\"field\": \"cx\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [0, 120]}, \"title\": \"Pitch X\"}, \"y\": {\"field\": \"cy\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"scale\": {\"domain\": [80, 0]}, \"title\": \"Pitch Y\"}, \"size\": {\"field\": \"passes\", \"type\": \"quantitative\", \"title\": \"Pass Count\", \"scale\": {\"range\": [50, 2000]}}, \"color\": {\"field\": \"team\", \"type\": \"nominal\", \"title\": \"Team\"}, \"opacity\": {\"value\": 0.7}, \"tooltip\": [{\"field\": \"team\", \"title\": \"Team\"}, {\"field\": \"cx\", \"title\": \"Zone X\"}, {\"field\": \"cy\", \"title\": \"Zone Y\"}, {\"field\": \"passes\", \"title\": \"Passes\"}]}, \"width\": 600, \"height\": 400, \"config\": {\"background\": \"#2d5a27\"}, \"autosize\": \"none\"}"}}

attributes.title: Football Event Analytics
attributes.description: End-to-end StatsBomb football analytics: shot maps, xG trends, pass networks
